main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'oxidative damage active layer por cloramina breakthrough GAC' literal.

recommended_action.justification: SBS 3:1 ratio (1.14 mg/L) + online analyzer + adjust — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide autopsia ATR-FTIR (amide II reduction) o XPS — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: tras SBS + control cloramina, conductividad no estabiliza + autopsia poliamida intacta → MECH.
